seo.title: Render pilot — Vigil Services Ltd
seo.description: Internal render verification page for the corporate site publishing pipeline. Not indexed and not linked from the site.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.body: This page exists to verify that content published from the Vigil CRM reaches the corporate website repository, builds, and renders exactly as approved. It is a technical checkpoint, not marketing content, and it is excluded from search indexing.
Vigil Services Ltd is registered in England and Wales, company registration 11756806, at Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU.
